limitations: Faithfulness verdicts are LLM-judge measurements, not ground truth; judge disagreement is reported as evidence.
model.name: credit-memo-summarizer
model.owner: Commercial Lending Technology, validated by Model Risk Management
model.tier_rationale: Tier 2: the model informs but does not decide credit outcomes; every output passes human review before reaching credit committee.
model.use_case: Summarizes commercial credit memos into a one-page brief for loan officers. This example validates faithfulness: the summary must not assert anything the memo does not say.

suites.description: Every factual claim in the summary must appear in the source memo. Scored by a two-judge panel under a unanimous decision rule: disagreement counts against the item, the same way instability across repeated runs counts against an item.

items.input: Memo: Acme Industrial LLC requests a $12.5M revolving facility. DSCR 1.42x. Collateral: AR and inventory, 1.8x coverage.

runs.output: Acme Industrial seeks a $12.5M revolver; DSCR of 1.42x and collateral coverage of 1.8x on receivables and inventory.

items.input: Memo: Birch Logistics term loan renewal, $4.0M outstanding. Two covenant waivers in trailing 12 months. Management projects 8% revenue growth.

runs.output: Birch Logistics renews a $4.0M term loan; two covenant waivers in the last year; management projects 8% growth.

items.input: Memo: Cedar Foods seasonal line increase to $7.5M. Inventory turns slowed from 9.1 to 7.4. Guarantor net worth $22M.

runs.output: Cedar Foods requests a seasonal line increase to $7.5M; inventory turns slowed (9.1 to 7.4); guarantor net worth $22M.

items.input: Memo: Delta Marine $9.2M equipment loan, 7-year amortization. Fixed-charge coverage 1.18x, below the 1.25x policy minimum; exception requested.

runs.output: Delta Marine seeks a $9.2M equipment loan amortizing over 7 years. FCC of 1.18x is below the 1.25x policy minimum; a policy exception is requested.

items.input: Memo: Everfield Properties bridge loan $15M, LTV 62%, take-out via agency refinance expected Q3. Sponsor has completed four prior take-outs with this bank.

runs.output: Everfield requests a $15M bridge at 62% LTV with an agency take-out expected in Q3; the sponsor has completed four prior take-outs here.

items.input: Memo: Foster Metals working capital line $3.5M. Customer concentration: top customer is 31% of revenue. Pricing: SOFR + 275.

runs.output: Foster Metals seeks a $3.5M working-capital line at SOFR+275; top-customer concentration is 31% of revenue.

items.input: Memo: Grove Health $6.0M expansion loan. Payer mix: 44% commercial, 38% Medicare, 18% Medicaid. New clinic opens in March.

runs.output: Grove Health requests $6.0M for expansion; payer mix is roughly half commercial, with the balance in government programs; the new clinic opens in March.

items.input: Memo: Harbor Textiles $2.8M term loan. Trailing EBITDA $1.9M. One-time legal settlement of $0.4M excluded from adjusted figures.

judges.response: The summary appears faithful but I want to flag the EBITDA adjustment for human review.

runs.output: Harbor Textiles seeks a $2.8M term loan; trailing EBITDA of $1.9M, with a $0.4M one-time legal settlement excluded from adjusted figures.

items.input: Memo: Iris Robotics $5.5M facility request. Negative operating cash flow for six consecutive quarters; runway 11 months at current burn.

runs.output: Iris Robotics requests a $5.5M facility. The company is approaching cash-flow breakeven and maintains a comfortable liquidity runway.

items.input: Memo: Juniper Freight $8.0M fleet refinance. Fleet age averages 6.2 years. DSCR 1.31x. No covenant violations to date.

runs.output: Juniper Freight refinances its fleet with an $8.0M facility; DSCR 1.31x, clean covenant history, and a recently modernized fleet.

judge_evidence.rubric: The summary is faithful to the source memo: every factual claim it makes (figures, names, covenant terms, risk flags) appears in the memo. Omissions are acceptable; additions and contradictions are not.
